# CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularFullImage

**Class**

A template for displaying a full-color image that fills the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
class CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularFullImage
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/graphicRectangular] family.



The table below lists the dimensions of the image you use in this template. Use images with a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIImage/scale] of `2.0` for display on Apple Watch so the point-based dimensions are half the listed size.



This template supports full-color images.

Instead of providing multiple images with different resolutions, you can provide a single, scaleable PDF asset. For more information, see `Manage Assets`.

## Creating the Template

- **init(imageProvider:)**: Creates a template with a large rectangular image.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **imageProvider**: The image to display.

## Large Images and Views

- **CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularLargeImage**: A template for displaying a large rectangle containing header text and an image.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularLargeView**: A template for displaying a large rectangle containing header text and a SwiftUI view.
- **CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicRectangularFullView**: A template for displaying a SwiftUI view that fills the entire template.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
